title: Weak Symmetric Cipher
description: Use of DES, 3DES, RC2, RC4, or AES in ECB mode violates SOC2 CC6.7. These ciphers are either broken or provide insufficient security for sensitive data encryption.

finding.message: Weak or broken cipher '{{token}}' used in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Use AES-256-GCM or ChaCha20-Poly1305 for authenticated encryption.
Never use ECB mode — it is deterministic and leaks plaintext patterns.
RC4 is prohibited by RFC 7465; DES has a 56-bit key and is broken by brute force.
NIST SP 800-175B provides approved algorithm selection guidance.
